case_title: STEVEN SELTZER VS. WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-15-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELTZER, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA INC. $850.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $897.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY SELTZER, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SELTZER, STEVEN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELTZER, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. GARY RUIZ, MANAGER, APPEARS FOR THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORT. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.
